response_constraints: Base the final answer only on returned tool results; do not imply that a skipped or failed call succeeded.
Respect the stage boundaries: calls grouped as parallel must be issued together in one assistant action, and later calls must wait for the IDs, status, date, or mutation result they consume.
Do not use extra write or notification tools beyond the single action path explicitly requested.

stages.purpose: Resolve the two independent names in one parallel search action.
Retrieve the unique stage-1 matches together before checking the mutation condition.
Cancel Community hall fiber plan only after stage 2 verifies its unique ID and pending-activation status.

arguments.body: Community hall fiber plan was cancelled after status verification.
arguments.subject: Record update: Community hall fiber plan

stages.purpose: Notify the named operational recipient only after stage 3 returns a successful mutation.

state_assertions: Record tel-678 changes from pending-activation to cancelled with the stated reason.
Record tel-278 and distractor tel-1078 remain unchanged.
Exactly one notification is sent to service desk, and only after the mutation succeeds.

prompt: Resolve Shelter mobile plan in Family Account and Community hall fiber plan in Studio Account with parallel searches, then retrieve both unique matches together. If Community hall fiber plan is still pending-activation, cancel only Community hall fiber plan, with reason "Requester withdrew the pending activation". Leave Shelter mobile plan unchanged. Only after that mutation succeeds, notify service desk with the outcome; do not send a notice if the mutation is skipped or fails. Do not take any extra write or notification action beyond the path I specified.

stage_4.body: Community hall fiber plan was cancelled after status verification.
